CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2025 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Purtell and James O'Brien for plaintiff Jimmy Xiao.
Justin Marvisi for defendant 610-660 Clipper I1, LP.

The matter was called for hearing on Plaintiff's Motion for Attorney's Fees.

Both sides contested the Court's tentative ruling. Mr. Marvisi argued that plaintiff was not entitled to fees, based on the lease's mutual fee waiver and the terms of a 998 settlement and release, and also argued that the amounts sought were excessive. Mr. Purtell argued the release did not waive statutory fees, that indemnity provisions applied to third parties, and that the hours and rates were reasonable. After hearing argument from both sides, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES is GRANTED. Attorney's fees at reasonable rate (as requested) for hours reasonably spent to litigate this matter are granted on the amount of $42,300.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Continued To Dec-19-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Justin Marvisi, Esq. for Plaintiff Jimmy Xiao via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff requests for a different date from what is listed in the tentative ruling as Plaintiff is unavailable.

Good Cause appearing, The Court grants plaintiff's request and continues the motion to December 19, 2025. The dates listed on the tentative ruling is vacated. The terms remain. "...[P]arties to submit supplemental briefs (not to exceed 3 pages) addressing authorities regarding parties (to a residential lease) ability to contract around/away attorney's fees provided for by a statute, i.e. whether parties may contractually agree to forgo recovery of attorney's fees provided by statute by agreeing that each side shall bear their own attorney's fees and court costs.."

Plaintiff's counsel to prepare and submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
